reviews.review_title: Unable to play, do not buy
reviews.review_description:
Added this to my wishlist weeks ago and was so excited to finally try it, but unfortunately, I am only able to see the game download and read the welcome screen. Dev support responded and I clarified the issue and included screenshots of what I was experiencing, and they basically told me how to try pressing buttons and ceased communication-not before reviewing their own game positively to offset the 1 star review I had to give them after getting ripped off

As of 06/11/2026 still no resolution despite my reply to the dev’s last email.

developer_response.body: Thank you for this review! We are looking into it. Please email us at sentarivr@gmail.com if you have more information on this bug.
